emails.subject: Re: Response to ORA/TURN petition
emails.body: Re: Response to ORA/TURN petition Leslie: Jeff and Susan might be able to help with the pipeline charges. Susan: I'm not ignoring you. Of course I'll come. Give me a call and let's figure out a date for me to address your illustrious group. Jeff: How's married life treating you. Leslie: Sorry for all the extraneous babbling. Best, Jeff Leslie Lawner 01/23/2001 03:20 PM
